summary: Iteration 10 testing of new features: AI Features, PayPal integration, Email/Password Reset, Spotify Canvas, YouTube Content ID, Advanced Analytics, and Beat Previews. Backend: 26/28 tests passed (93%). Frontend: All pages and features working correctly. The 2 backend test failures are due to test script using wrong request schema (not a backend bug).

minor.issue: Test used wrong schema (missing artist_name). Endpoint works correctly with proper schema.

issues: Console warning: chart width/height -1 - Recharts component sizing issue when container not fully rendered. Non-blocking.

passed_tests: POST /api/spotify-canvas creates canvas with valid release
POST /api/youtube-content-id registers release for Content ID
GET /api/analytics/chart-data returns 14 days of chart data
Frontend: Landing page loads with KALMORI branding
Frontend: Login page has email, password, submit, and forgot password link
Frontend: Reset Password page loads at /reset-password and /forgot-password
Frontend: Login with admin credentials redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows Spotify Canvas and Content ID in sidebar
Frontend: Analytics page loads with 4 tabs (Overview, Audience Map, TikTok UGC, Platforms)
Frontend: Analytics 'Get AI Insights' button visible and clickable
Frontend: Spotify Canvas page shows specs, release selector, create button
Frontend: Content ID page shows how-it-works section, release selector, register button
Frontend: Instrumentals/Leasing page shows beat catalog with play buttons
Frontend: Beat preview play buttons work
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions - consider adding minWidth/minHeight to chart containers
Note: PayPal runs in SANDBOX SIMULATION mode (no API keys configured)
Note: Email notifications via Resend are SKIPPED (no API key) but DB operations work

success_rate.backend: 93% (26/28 passed - 2 failures due to test script schema issue)

seed_data_creation: Canvas and Content ID registrations created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: AI Features (GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key), PayPal (SANDBOX SIMULATION - no API keys), Email/Password Reset (Resend SKIPPED - no API key but DB works), Spotify Canvas (video upload to Object Storage), YouTube Content ID (registration management), Advanced Analytics (4 tabs with charts), Beat audio previews. Backend routes are modularized in /app/backend/routes/ directory.

mocked_apis.PayPal: Runs in sandbox simulation mode - no API keys configured. Returns simulated order IDs.
mocked_apis.Resend Email: Email sending is skipped (no API key) but password reset tokens are stored in DB and can be used.

PayPal Integration.create_order: Creates simulated orders with SIMULATED- prefix

Password Reset.forgot_password: Creates reset token in DB, sends email if Resend configured

Spotify Canvas.specs: Returns canvas requirements (format, aspect ratio, duration, etc.)

Advanced Analytics.overview: Returns total streams, earnings, by store/country

Beat Previews.catalog: Shows 6 demo beats with play buttons
